events.expected_signal: HTTP 400 with a JSON error body
events.failure_oracle: The input validation verifier fails if the request is accepted or becomes HTTP 5xx.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.

events.expected_signal: HTTP 400 because JSON request bodies must be objects
events.failure_oracle: The input validation verifier fails if non-object JSON is accepted.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: POST /networks/create with a JSON array body

events.failure_oracle: The storage and input validation verifiers fail if impossible sizes pass.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: Storage snapshots with negative bytes, free bytes greater than total, or double-counted image views

events.expected_signal: A pdocker runtime error is returned before RUN, exec, or compose service execution proceeds
events.failure_oracle: Runtime contract checks fail if the system silently falls back or records fake success.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: Configured direct executor is missing, not executable, or does not advertise process execution

events.expected_signal: The direct executor returns ENOMEM-like denial with memory diagnostics instead of letting LMK kill the app
events.failure_oracle: A containerized memory-guard probe must fail if the guard allows a known unsafe allocation.
events.gap_reason: The heavy container memory-guard probe is designed but not safe for every host-only fast run.
events.retention: Keep long-run artifacts outside the fast lane and attach them to the build set.
events.trigger: A large allocation would cross the configured Android low-memory guard threshold

events.expected_signal: pdocker records the last memory telemetry sample, classifies the operation as interrupted-or-lmk-suspected, and avoids stale Up/running UI state
events.failure_oracle: The OOM survival replay must fail if the operation disappears without evidence, leaves stale running state, or loses the container/operation identity.
events.gap_reason: The telemetry ring and LMK replay classifier are designed but not implemented as an executable device test yet.
events.retention: Keep device artifacts for release-candidate test sets and attach the operation memory ring.
events.trigger: Android kills a running build, container, or daemon process during low-memory pressure

events.expected_signal: The terminal remains readonly and does not summon the soft keyboard
events.failure_oracle: UI action checks fail if readonly terminal metadata or keyboard suppression is removed.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: A readonly build, daemon, or log terminal receives focus or text selection

events.expected_signal: The UI reports the missing grant or failed sync without pretending the path is a POSIX bind mount
events.failure_oracle: Documents mediator smoke and UI checks fail if missing grants are treated as writable.
events.retention: Keep device artifacts for release-candidate test sets.
events.trigger: The user has not granted a Documents tree or the tree refuses writes

events.expected_signal: The bridge returns an explicit diagnostic instead of fake success or wrong CPU output
events.failure_oracle: GPU bridge smoke fails if unsupported work is accepted without a diagnostic.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: A GPU workload requests unsupported bridge behavior

events.expected_signal: The request is rejected or recorded with a compatibility warning before any misleading container state is created
events.failure_oracle: A network negative corpus must fail if unsupported modes are accepted silently.
events.gap_reason: A dedicated network negative corpus is not implemented yet.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: Compose or Engine API asks for a network mode outside default, bridge, host, or none

events.expected_signal: The test-design verifier writes an artifact and exits nonzero
events.failure_oracle: The verifier must fail and must not pass while the literal ratio remains below the configured minimum.
events.retention: Keep latest artifact in docs/test and preserve release-candidate artifacts with the build set.
events.trigger: The selected semantic+C0+C1+C2 check count is below two times implementation token count
